findings.title: Reminder cap exhausted
findings.why: Household Levi has exhausted their reminder cap and still has not responded. The automated system can no longer reach them.
findings.do: Make a personal phone call to the Levi Family.

findings.title: Unreachable household
findings.why: Peretz family has no valid phone number on record and is still pending. They are currently unreachable by automated systems.
findings.do: Contact the Peretz family through another available channel.

findings.title: Seating overcapacity
findings.why: Table 1 is over capacity with 6 assigned but only 4 seats, leaving 2 guests without seating.
findings.do: Reassign some guests from Table 1 to other available tables.
